components.title: Weight Morph Wave

components.title: Scramble Decode

components.title: 3D Extruded Word

components.title: Stagger Cascade

components.title: Rack Focus

components.title: Kerning Breath

components.title: Ransom Assembly

components.title: Ticker Tape Fall

components.title: Line Wipe Sweep

components.title: Optical Axis Morph

components.title: Baseline Bounce
components.description: Amber monospace letters spelling BOUNCE drop and spring on a baseline rail with squash-stretch and shadow puddles in a staggered ripple.

components.title: Vapor Condense

components.title: Pivot Flip Row

components.title: Donut Ring Progress

components.title: Sparkline Moving Dot

components.title: Radial Gauge Needle

components.title: Radar Pulse

components.title: Heatmap Ripple

components.title: Bubble Pack Jiggle
components.description: Fourteen multicolor gradient bubbles packing toward center with soft collision relaxation and gentle jiggle, repacks on click.

components.title: Candlestick Ticker

components.title: Streamgraph Drift

components.title: Slope Chart Crossing

components.title: Scatter Regression Settle

components.title: Contour Breathing

components.title: Ridgeline Morph

components.title: Chord Rebalance

components.title: Dot Plot Rank Flip

components.title: Glow Slider

components.title: Spring Stepper

components.title: Segmented Control

components.title: Checkbox Morph

components.title: Radio Ripple

components.title: OTP Boxes

components.title: Crown Dial

components.title: Slide Throw Lever

components.title: Pressure Pad

components.title: Thumbwheel Scrubber
